notes: External modding tools run THROUGH MO2 (custom executables). Binaries are bootstrapped into mo2/tools (gitignored), never committed. See ADR 0012.

tools.name: LOOT
tools.notes: Load Order Optimisation Tool. Run through MO2 so it reads the virtual load order.

tools.name: SSEEdit (xEdit)
tools.notes: xEdit for Skyrim SE. Must run through MO2 to see the virtual Data folder.

tools.name: BethINI Pie
tools.notes: Universal Bethesda INI editor. Run through MO2 so edits hit the active profile INIs.
